name: Textile Study 01
shortDescription: Hand-printed textile with layered geometry and botanical detail.
description: A textile study exploring rhythm, spacing, and pigment density. Designed to age gently with use—softening, settling, and deepening over time.
care: Spot clean or gentle cold wash

images.alt: Hand-printed textile detail with geometric bands
Hand-printed textile detail with botanical motif
Hand-printed textile detail with circular elements

name: Textile Study 02
shortDescription: Botanical imprint with restrained palette and shadowed texture.
description: A composition built from quiet contrasts and tactile print edges. Crafted to feel lived-in and familiar, while remaining precise in form.

name: Textile Study 03
shortDescription: Pattern study with repeated bands and circular motifs.
description: A modular pattern designed for everyday settings—table, bed, or wall—where material presence matters as much as the graphic language.

images.alt: Pattern study textile with repeated bands

name: Custom Commission
shortDescription: Collaborate on a custom textile or object for your space.
description: For clients who want a piece tailored to scale, palette, and context. Share a reference, intended use, and timeline—DHYAI responds personally.

name: Process Study 01
description: A documentation of material handling and decision-making. Useful for collaborators and collectors who want to understand the work behind the work.

name: Process Study 02
description: A closer look at printing, pressure, and pigment—where time and repetition build the final surface.
